1.title: Opening Hole
1.text: A gentle dogleg right with a generous fairway. Just don't let the two green-side bunkers spoil your opening handshake.

2.title: Into the Wind
2.text: Playing uphill and often into the wind, this hole is tougher than it looks. Find the green and a par feels well earned.

3.title: Birdie Chance
3.text: One of Benamor's best birdie opportunities. If you don't make one here, there's always the back nine.

4.title: Keep It Simple
4.text: Two solid shots give you another birdie chance. Easy on paper—but golf rarely is.

5.title: Thread the Needle
5.text: A strong uphill drive is essential. Trees left and trouble right make the fairway feel much narrower.

6.title: Feed the Green
6.text: A good approach can feed down towards the green. Just don't let the left bunker collect your good intentions.

7.title: Stay Focused
7.text: An uphill tee shot leads to a generous fairway, but the green-side bunkers punish any lapse in concentration.

8.title: Take More Club
8.text: Playing uphill, most golfers need more club than expected. Walk away with par and you've gained ground.

9.title: Everyone's Watching
9.text: The clubhouse terrace has a front-row seat. Now's a great time to hit your best shot of the day.

10.title: Enjoy the View
10.text: One of Benamor's most scenic holes. Enjoy the view—but don't forget to check the wind.

11.title: Go for Birdie
11.text: A genuine birdie chance. A good drive leaves only a simple pitch—assuming your nerves cooperate.

12.title: Find the Right Level
12.text: The long green offers many pin positions, but accuracy is everything. Miss slightly and the bunkers are waiting.

13.title: Risk or Reward
13.text: Lay up before the ditch or take it on for a shorter approach. Fortune often favours the brave.

14.title: Looks Can Deceive
14.text: Harder than it looks. The uphill approach needs more club than most players expect.

15.title: Keep It Straight
15.text: Out of bounds on both sides rewards accuracy. Keep it straight and this hole becomes much friendlier.

16.title: See Your Landing
16.text: A long drive is the key. Position your approach so you can actually see where it lands.

17.title: Carry with Confidence
17.text: Water guards the front, bunkers protect both sides. The green is generous—the entrance is not.

18.title: Finish Strong
18.text: A demanding finish with out of bounds on both sides. Make par here and you've earned your clubhouse drink.
